tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DescribeEntitiesDetectionV2Job.describeEntitiesDetectionV2Job
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with a medical entities detection job. Use this operation to get the status of a detection job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DescribeIcD10CmInferenceJob.describeIcD10CmInferenceJob
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with an InferICD10CM job. Use this operation to get the status of an inference job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DescribePhiDetectionJob.describePhiDetectionJob
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with a protected health information (PHI) detection job. Use this operation to get the status of a detection job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DescribeRxNormInferenceJob.describeRxNormInferenceJob
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with an InferRxNorm job. Use this operation to get the status of an inference job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DescribeSnomedctInferenceJob.describeSnomedctInferenceJob
tools.description: Gets the properties associated with an InferSNOMEDCT job. Use this operation to get the status of an inference job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DetectEntities.detectEntities
tools.description:
The DetectEntities operation is deprecated. You should use the DetectEntitiesV2 operation instead.

Inspects the clinical text for a variety of medical entities and returns specific information about them such as entity category, location, and confidence score on that information .

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DetectEntitiesV2.detectEntitiesV2
tools.description:
Inspects the clinical text for a variety of medical entities and returns specific information about them such as entity category, location, and confidence score on that information. Amazon Comprehend Medical only detects medical entities in English language texts.

The DetectEntitiesV2 operation replaces the DetectEntities operation. This new action uses a different model for determining the entities in your medical text and changes the way that some entities are returned in the output. You should use the DetectEntitiesV2 operation in all new applications.

The DetectEntitiesV2 operation returns the Acuity and Direction entities as attributes instead of types.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030DetectPhi.detectPhi
tools.description: Inspects the clinical text for protected health information (PHI) entities and returns the entity category, location, and confidence score for each entity. Amazon Comprehend Medical only detects entities in English language texts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030InferIcD10Cm.inferIcD10Cm
tools.description: InferICD10CM detects medical conditions as entities listed in a patient record and links those entities to normalized concept identifiers in the ICD-10-CM knowledge base from the Centers for Disease Control. Amazon Comprehend Medical only detects medical entities in English language texts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030InferRxNorm.inferRxNorm
tools.description: InferRxNorm detects medications as entities listed in a patient record and links to the normalized concept identifiers in the RxNorm database from the National Library of Medicine. Amazon Comprehend Medical only detects medical entities in English language texts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030InferSnomedct.inferSnomedct
tools.description: InferSNOMEDCT detects possible medical concepts as entities and links them to codes from the Systematized Nomenclature of Medicine, Clinical Terms (SNOMED-CT) ontology

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030ListEntitiesDetectionV2Jobs.listEntitiesDetectionV2Jobs
tools.description: Gets a list of medical entity detection jobs that you have submitted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030ListIcD10CmInferenceJobs.listIcD10CmInferenceJobs
tools.description: Gets a list of InferICD10CM jobs that you have submitted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030ListPhiDetectionJobs.listPhiDetectionJobs
tools.description: Gets a list of protected health information (PHI) detection jobs that you have submitted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030ListRxNormInferenceJobs.listRxNormInferenceJobs
tools.description: Gets a list of InferRxNorm jobs that you have submitted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030ListSnomedctInferenceJobs.listSnomedctInferenceJobs
tools.description: Gets a list of InferSNOMEDCT jobs a user has submitted.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StartEntitiesDetectionV2Job.startEntitiesDetectionV2Job
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous medical entity detection job for a collection of documents. Use the DescribeEntitiesDetectionV2Job operation to track the status of a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StartIcD10CmInferenceJob.startIcD10CmInferenceJob
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous job to detect medical conditions and link them to the ICD-10-CM ontology. Use the DescribeICD10CMInferenceJob operation to track the status of a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StartPhiDetectionJob.startPhiDetectionJob
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous job to detect protected health information (PHI). Use the DescribePHIDetectionJob operation to track the status of a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StartRxNormInferenceJob.startRxNormInferenceJob
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous job to detect medication entities and link them to the RxNorm ontology. Use the DescribeRxNormInferenceJob operation to track the status of a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StartSnomedctInferenceJob.startSnomedctInferenceJob
tools.description: Starts an asynchronous job to detect medical concepts and link them to the SNOMED-CT ontology. Use the DescribeSNOMEDCTInferenceJob operation to track the status of a job.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StopEntitiesDetectionV2Job.stopEntitiesDetectionV2Job
tools.description: Stops a medical entities detection job in progress.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StopIcD10CmInferenceJob.stopIcD10CmInferenceJob
tools.description: Stops an InferICD10CM inference job in progress.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StopPhiDetectionJob.stopPhiDetectionJob
tools.description: Stops a protected health information (PHI) detection job in progress.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StopRxNormInferenceJob.stopRxNormInferenceJob
tools.description: Stops an InferRxNorm inference job in progress.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComprehendMedical20181030StopSnomedctInferenceJob.stopSnomedctInferenceJob
tools.description: Stops an InferSNOMEDCT inference job in progress.
